steps.title: Spot the unclosed parenthetical
steps.content: The phrase “mustang” (a wild horse) properly closes its parenthetical, but “rodeo” (a ______ leaves the parenthetical open—there's an opening parenthesis with no closing match.

steps.title: Close the parenthetical
steps.content: A parenthetical expression that begins with an opening parenthesis must close with a matching closing parenthesis. Choice B, roundup), closes the parenthetical and mirrors the first example's structure. Choices A, C, and D leave the parenthesis unclosed by using comma, semicolon, or em-dash instead. That matches choice B — B is correct.
